outside_date_duration.initial_outside_date_found: 12-month anniversary of the date of this Agreement
risk_factors: Initial outside date is 12 months, which is below the 18-month standard for complex deals.
Extensions are limited to regulatory delays, which may not cover other potential issues.
No separate regulatory termination fee exists, allowing the buyer to exit without significant penalties for regulatory issues.
Standard termination fee provisions do not incentivize the buyer to address antitrust concerns effectively.

specific_performance_conditions: All conditions to closing must be satisfied or waived, except for those that are to be satisfied at the Effective Time.
No material breach by the Company that results in failure of conditions to closing.
risk_factors: Specific performance is available but conditioned on satisfaction of closing conditions.
The RTF is the exclusive remedy for the buyer, limiting the seller's options if the buyer walks away.
Willful breach liability survives payment of the Company termination fee (CTF) but not the reverse termination fee (RTF).
Explicit carveout for knowing and intentional breach by the Company prior to termination or fraud by the Company in making representations and warranties.
No definition of 'willful breach' provided in the agreement.
Short matching window of 10 days may limit acquirer's ability to respond effectively to superior proposals.
Intervening event provisions allow for potential changes in recommendation, which could favor the target's interests.

unilateral_extension.maximum_extension_date_text: 12 months from the date of this Agreement plus 3 months
risk_factors: Automatic extension based on regulatory conditions
No unilateral extension rights for either party

top_concerns: RTF is exclusive remedy — target cannot compel closing via specific performance (buyer-favorable)
